description: CompositionBlack trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets at the back with buttoned closures, brand patch above the right hip pocket, metal zip and button closure, reinforced stitch detailing and extendible hemsFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe man of substance always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it just that much easier with these stylish casual trousers. Designed with the best cotton fabric, this pair makes for a perfect daily office or partywear option. Pair it with a checked shirt and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
